# Edualist

> International school consulting and parent-student coaching for Turkish families relocating abroad, founded by Özlem Çimen in Dubai.

Edualist helps Turkish families navigate international school selection, curriculum evaluation, admissions processes, and student adaptation when moving abroad — especially to Dubai, UAE. Founded by Özlem Çimen, an education professional with 20+ years of experience and an expat mother who raised two children across five countries.

## About the Founder

Özlem Çimen is an international education consultant and parent-student coach based in Dubai, UAE.

- 20+ years as English teacher, department head, and school administrator at TED Istanbul College, ENKA Schools, and Istanbul International Community School (IICS)
- Expat mother: lived and schooled children in Singapore, Myanmar, France, Azerbaijan, and UAE
- MBA in International Marketing (USA)
- Certified in Child Protection, Differentiated Instruction (Harvard Graduate School of Education), and IB Curricula
- Expert in EAL (English as an Additional Language) support

Contact: ozlem@edualist.com
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/myedualist/
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/myedualist
X / Twitter: https://x.com/OzlemGunayCimen

## Services

- **School Placement & Relocation Support** — Detailed student assessment, curriculum guidance, school shortlist (up to 4 schools), and admissions support for families moving to Dubai or abroad
- **Academic Coaching** — EAL/ESL support, strategic study planning, and adaptation coaching for students transitioning to international schools
- **VIP Relocation & Coaching Programme** — Premium school placement including scholarship opportunities, personal coaching, and full-process support

## Key Pages

- [Why Edualist? About the Founder](https://www.edualist.com/neden-biz/): Background, credentials, and the personal expat journey behind Edualist
- [International School Consulting Service](https://www.edualist.com/uluslararasi-okul-danismanligi/): Transactional service page — school placement, academic coaching, and VIP relocation support with pricing and booking
- [Blog](https://www.edualist.com/blog/): 34 in-depth guides on international school selection, curriculum comparison, and relocation for Turkish families
- [AI Chatbot — Ela (EduBot)](https://ai-edualist-com.vercel.app/): Edualist's 24/7 AI advisor for school selection questions, curriculum comparison, and country-specific guidance

## Blog Articles

- [Dubai'de Yaşam Maliyeti 2026: Türk Aileler İçin Gerçek Rakamlar](https://www.edualist.com/blog/dubai-yasam-maliyeti-2026/): Rent, school, groceries, transport and health costs for Turkish expat families in Dubai — three family budget scenarios (18,700–50,500 AED/month) and how zero income tax makes Dubai more affordable than it appears
- [Türkiye'nin En Pahalı Okulları vs Dubai'nin En İyileri: 2026 Ücret Karşılaştırması](https://www.edualist.com/blog/turkiye-dubai-okul-ucreti-karsilastirma/): Koç Okulu, Robert Kolej and British International School fees compared with Dubai KHDA Outstanding schools at 1 AED = 12.65 TL — curriculum, university outcomes, and tax-free salary insight
- [Dubai'ye Gelmeden Önce Bilmeniz Gerekenler](https://www.edualist.com/blog/dubai-gelmeden-once-bilmeniz-gerekenler/): 7 critical things Turkish families must know before relocating to Dubai — school enrollment timing, true costs, curriculum choice, neighbourhood selection, language readiness, and cultural adaptation
- [Dubai'nin En İyi Uluslararası Okulları](https://www.edualist.com/blog/dubai-en-iyi-uluslararasi-okullar/): KHDA Outstanding-rated schools in Dubai for 2023–24
- [Dubai Okul Kaydı Rehberi](https://www.edualist.com/blog/dubai-okul-kayit-rehberi/): Step-by-step guide to Dubai school registration process
- [BAE'de Uluslararası Okul Seçimi](https://www.edualist.com/blog/bae-uluslararasi-okul-rehberi/): IB, British, and American curricula compared for UAE families
- [IB, A-Level, Amerikan Müfredat Karşılaştırması](https://www.edualist.com/blog/ib-alevel-amerikan-mufredat-karsilastirma/): Detailed comparison of major international curricula and university admissions impact
- [Türkiye Eğitim Sistemi Neden Yetmiyor?](https://www.edualist.com/blog/turkiye-egitim-sistemi-neden-yetmiyor/): Data-driven analysis of Turkey's education system using PISA data
- [Türk Eğitim Sisteminden Uluslararası Okula Geçiş](https://www.edualist.com/blog/turk-egitim-sisteminden-uluslararasi-okula-gecis/): 7 common challenges and how to overcome them

- [Lise Döneminde Yurt Dışı Taşınma](https://www.edualist.com/blog/lise-yurt-disi-tasinma-adaptasyon/): Social and academic adaptation for high school students relocating abroad

- [Kanada Okul Kayıt Rehberi](https://www.edualist.com/blog/kanada-okul-kayit-rehberi/): Ontario and BC school enrollment for Turkish families
- [İngiltere Okul Kayıt Rehberi](https://www.edualist.com/blog/ingiltere-okul-kayit-rehberi/): UK state and independent school system, Ofsted ratings, 11+ exam
- [Almanya Okul Kayıt Rehberi](https://www.edualist.com/blog/almanya-okul-kayit-rehberi/): Germany's federal school system and enrollment process

- [Hollanda Okul Kayıt Rehberi](https://www.edualist.com/blog/hollanda-okul-kayit-rehberi/): Dutch school system and CITO transition test
- [İtalya Okul Kayıt Rehberi](https://www.edualist.com/blog/italya-okul-kayit-rehberi/): Italian school system and enrollment for Turkish families
- [Kızım Sınıfın Zemininde Yatıyordu](https://www.edualist.com/blog/kizim-sinifin-zemininde-yatiyordu/): Personal account of the real cost of choosing the wrong school
- [Oğlumun İngilizcesi İyiydi](https://www.edualist.com/blog/oglumun-ingilizcesi-iyiydi/): Why language fluency alone is not enough for international school success
- [Dubai'de Türk Okulu Yok — Peki Ne Yapacaksınız?](https://www.edualist.com/blog/dubai-turk-okulu-var-mi/): No Turkish curriculum school in Dubai — which curriculum to choose and how to preserve Turkish language
- [İngilizcesi Yetersiz Çocuk Dubai Okuluna Nasıl Uyum Sağlar?](https://www.edualist.com/blog/ingilizcesi-yetersiz-cocuk-dubai-okulu-uyum/): EAL programmes, age-based adaptation, and what parents can do at home
- [Türkiye Her Yıl 46.000 Çocuğunu Yurt Dışına Gönderiyor](https://www.edualist.com/blog/turkiye-yilda-46000-cocugunu-yurt-disina-gonderiyor/): TÜİK migration data on children and young people leaving Turkey annually
- [Eduentry — Uluslararası Akademik Değerlendirme](https://www.edualist.com/blog/eduentry-uluslararasi-akademik-degerlendirme-nedir/): Free adaptive academic assessment for children aged 6–17 benchmarked against UK, US, PISA and IB frameworks using 2PL IRT methodology
- [Gelecekte Hangi Meslekler Önem Kazanacak?](https://www.edualist.com/blog/gelecekte-hangi-meslekler-onem-kazanacak/): WEF, McKinsey and IMF data on 7 job categories gaining importance by 2030 — AI & data science, cybersecurity, green energy, health & biotech, education & coaching, creative economy, robotics — and how curriculum choices today shape children's career readiness
- [Dubai'de Okul Bursu İmkânları](https://www.edualist.com/blog/dubai-okul-burs-imkanlari/): How scholarships work at Dubai international schools — merit, sport, arts bursaries, sibling discounts, and employer education allowances; which schools offer them and how to apply
- [Abu Dhabi'de Uluslararası Okul](https://www.edualist.com/blog/abu-dhabi-uluslararasi-okullar/): ADEK-rated international schools in Abu Dhabi — BSAK, Cranleigh, AGS, Repton, GEMS World Academy; fee ranges and comparison with Dubai
- [Dubai'de Okul Başvurusu Nasıl Yapılır?](https://www.edualist.com/blog/dubai-okul-basvuru-nasil-yapilir/): Step-by-step guide to the Dubai international school application — form, documents checklist, assessment day, and what to do if rejected
- [Uluslararası Okul Mülakatında Sorulan Sorular](https://www.edualist.com/blog/uluslararasi-okul-mulakat-sorulari/): Real interview questions by age group (primary, middle, secondary) plus parent meeting questions — with example answers and what to avoid
- [İspanya'da Uluslararası Okul Rehberi](https://www.edualist.com/blog/ispanya-okul-kayit-rehberi/): British, IB and American curriculum schools in Madrid, Barcelona and Costa del Sol — fees (0–28,000 EUR), NIE number, step-by-step enrolment, and Spanish transition plan
- [Dubai Semt Rehberi — Okula Göre Bölge](https://www.edualist.com/blog/dubai-semt-rehberi/): Where to live in Dubai based on school location — Jumeirah, JVC, Arabian Ranches, Emirates Hills mapped to KHDA Outstanding schools with rental ranges and family recommendations
- [İngiltere'de Devlet mi Özel mi?](https://www.edualist.com/blog/ingiltere-devlet-ozel-okul/): UK state vs independent school comparison — Ofsted, grammar school 11+ exam, fee ranges (free to £60K boarding), university outcomes, bursaries, and a decision guide for Turkish families

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What does Edualist do?**
Edualist provides international school consulting and parent-student coaching for Turkish families relocating to Dubai or abroad. Services include school selection, curriculum guidance, admissions support, and student adaptation coaching.

**Who is Özlem Çimen?**
Özlem Çimen is an education professional with 20+ years of experience and an expat mother who raised her children in Singapore, Myanmar, France, Azerbaijan, and Dubai. She founded Edualist to help Turkish families navigate international education transitions.

**What curricula does Edualist advise on?**
IB (PYP, MYP, Diploma), British (A-Level, IGCSE), American (AP, High School Diploma), French (Baccalauréat), and national systems in Germany, Netherlands, Italy, and Canada.

**How many international schools are in Dubai?**
Dubai has 200+ international schools regulated by KHDA (Knowledge and Human Development Authority). In 2023–24, 23 schools received the top "Outstanding" rating.

**What is the IB programme?**
The International Baccalaureate (IB) offers four programmes: PYP (ages 3–12), MYP (ages 11–16), Diploma (ages 16–19), and CP. The IB Diploma is recognized by universities worldwide and emphasizes critical thinking over rote memorization.

**What is a Third Culture Kid (TCK)?**
A Third Culture Kid is a child who grows up in a culture different from their parents' home culture. TCKs develop a unique hybrid identity and often struggle with questions of belonging — addressed in Edualist's TCK guide.

**How early should families start the Dubai school enrollment process?**
At least 12–18 months before the intended start date. Popular KHDA Outstanding-rated schools fill up quickly; late applications risk being waitlisted.

**What jobs will be most in demand by 2030?**
According to the WEF Future of Jobs 2025 report, the highest-growth categories are AI & data science (+30–40%), cybersecurity (+35%), robotics & automation engineering (+28%), green energy & sustainability (+24%), health & biotechnology (+20%), creative economy & UX (+18%), and education & coaching (+15%). The WEF also projects 170 million new jobs by 2030 while 92 million existing roles will be significantly transformed.

**What academic skills will matter most in the future job market?**
WEF's top skills for 2025–2030 are analytical thinking, creativity, adaptability, AI literacy, critical thinking, and problem-solving. Skills at risk include repetitive data processing, routine accounting, and rule-based decision-making. International curricula such as IB and A-Level directly develop the high-demand skills through critical inquiry, extended essay writing, and project-based learning.

**What is Eduentry?**
Eduentry is a free AI-powered adaptive academic assessment for children aged 6–17. It uses 2PL IRT (the same methodology as PISA, SAT, and GCSE) to measure maths, verbal reasoning, and English proficiency, benchmarked against UK, US, PISA, and IB international frameworks. Edualist recommends it to families before school selection to understand their child's current academic standing.
